hero.subtitle: From headless storefronts to Black Friday infrastructure, we build, integrate, and scale the technology that powers high-performance e-commerce.
painPoints.label: The challenge
painPoints.title: Technology bottlenecks that cost you sales
painPoints.speed.title: Slow storefronts
painPoints.speed.description: Of mobile visitors leave a site that takes longer than 3 seconds to load. Every 100ms of latency costs you conversions — and most e-commerce platforms ship bloated, slow themes by default.
painPoints.integration.title: Integration nightmares
painPoints.integration.description: Average number of critical systems (ERP, OMS, CRM, payments) a mid-market store needs connected. Without proper architecture, each integration becomes a fragile point of failure.
painPoints.scale.title: Traffic spikes crash
painPoints.scale.description: Of e-commerce sites experience downtime during peak sales events. If your infrastructure can't handle your biggest day, you're leaving your best revenue on the table.
services.label: Our services
services.title: End-to-end e-commerce engineering
services.storefront.title: Storefront development
services.storefront.description: Headless commerce with Hydrogen and Next.js, Shopify theme and app development, custom-built storefronts, and progressive web apps — fast by default.
services.storefront.features: Headless commerce (Hydrogen/Next.js), Shopify theme & app dev, Custom storefronts, Progressive web apps
services.migration.title: Platform migration
services.migration.description: Shopify, BigCommerce, and Magento migrations with zero downtime. Headless commerce transitions, data migration, and URL preservation that protect your SEO equity.
services.migration.features: Zero-downtime migrations, Headless transitions, Data migration, URL & SEO preservation
services.integrations.title: E-commerce integrations
services.integrations.description: ERP (NetSuite, SAP), CRM (HubSpot, Klaviyo), order management, PIM, payment gateways, and shipping APIs — connected reliably and built to scale.
services.integrations.features: ERP integration (NetSuite/SAP), CRM (HubSpot/Klaviyo), Payment gateways (Stripe/Adyen), Shipping & fulfillment APIs
services.checkout.title: Checkout & payments
services.checkout.description: Custom checkout flows, one-click purchasing, multi-currency support, subscription billing, and payment optimization that maximize conversion at the most critical moment.
services.checkout.features: Custom checkout flows, One-click purchasing, Multi-currency support, Subscription billing
services.performance.title: Performance engineering
services.performance.description: Page speed optimization, Core Web Vitals, CDN configuration, image optimization, and server-side rendering — making your store measurably faster.
services.performance.features: Core Web Vitals optimization, CDN configuration, Image optimization, Server-side rendering
services.infrastructure.title: Scalability & infrastructure
services.infrastructure.description: Auto-scaling for traffic spikes, load balancing, caching strategies, and database optimization — built to handle your biggest sales day, every day.
services.infrastructure.features: Auto-scaling architecture, Load balancing, Caching strategies, Database optimization
services.mobile.title: Mobile commerce
services.mobile.description: Native shopping apps, responsive storefront optimization, mobile-first UX, and push notification infrastructure for the channel where most shopping happens.
services.mobile.features: Native shopping apps, Responsive optimization, Mobile-first UX, Push notifications
metrics.label: Engineering outcomes
metrics.title: Performance that drives revenue
metrics.speed.label: Average page load time
metrics.uptime.label: Platform uptime SLA
metrics.conversion.label: Conversion rate improvement
metrics.revenue.label: Revenue uplift from speed
metrics.vitals.label: Core Web Vitals passing
howItWorks.label: Our process
howItWorks.title: From audit to production-grade infrastructure
howItWorks.step1.title: Audit
howItWorks.step1.description: We profile your storefront performance, review your tech stack architecture, and identify integration bottlenecks costing you conversions and uptime.
howItWorks.step2.title: Architect
howItWorks.step2.description: A technical blueprint with stack recommendations, migration strategy, integration map, and infrastructure plan — scoped with realistic timelines.
howItWorks.step3.title: Build
howItWorks.step3.description: Iterative development with staging environments, automated testing, and performance benchmarks at every sprint — shipping production-ready code.
howItWorks.step4.title: Optimize
howItWorks.step4.description: Post-launch monitoring, performance tuning, security audits, and infrastructure scaling as your traffic and catalog grow.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Start your e-commerce tech project
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your store and technical challenges. We'll respond within 24 hours with a preliminary architecture assessment.
cta.title: Book your e-commerce technical audit
cta.subtitle: 45-minute call. We'll review your storefront performance, identify architecture bottlenecks, and outline a technical roadmap — with concrete benchmarks.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.general.title: 1. General provisions
terms.general.body: These Terms & Conditions govern the use of services provided by GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us"). By engaging our services or using this website, you agree to these terms in full. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.services.title: 2. Scope of services
terms.services.body: GrowGroup provides e-commerce technology services including storefront development, platform migration, integrations, checkout optimization, performance engineering, infrastructure scaling, and mobile commerce as described in individual project agreements.
terms.ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
terms.ip.body: Upon full payment, all deliverables created specifically for the client become the client's property, unless stated otherwise in the project agreement. Pre-existing tools, frameworks, and methodologies used by GrowGroup remain the intellectual property of GrowGroup.
terms.payment.title: 4. Payment terms
terms.payment.body: Payment terms are defined in each project agreement. Unless otherwise specified, invoices are due within 14 days of issue. Late payments may incur interest at the statutory rate. GrowGroup reserves the right to suspend services if payments are overdue by more than 30 days.
terms.liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
terms.liability.body: GrowGroup's total liability for any claim arising from services provided shall not exceed the total fees paid by the client for the specific project in question. GrowGroup is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages, including lost profits or data.
terms.termination.title: 6. Termination
terms.termination.body: Either party may terminate an ongoing engagement with 30 days' written notice. Upon termination, the client is responsible for payment of all work completed up to the termination date. GrowGroup will provide reasonable handover of all deliverables and source code produced.
terms.law.title: 7. Governing law
terms.law.body: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Poland. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts in Poland.
terms.contact.title: 8. Contact
terms.contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@grow.com.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.intro.body: GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.collect.title: 2. Information we collect
privacy.collect.body: We collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details when you fill out a contact form or schedule a consultation. We also collect technical data automatically, including IP address, browser type, device information, and browsing behavior via cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.use.title: 3. How we use your data
privacy.use.body: We use your personal data to respond to inquiries and provide requested services, send project proposals and service-related communications, improve our website and services, comply with legal obligations, and — with your consent — send marketing communications about our services.
privacy.sharing.title: 4. Data sharing
privacy.sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business (e.g., hosting, analytics, CRM), but only to the extent necessary and under appropriate data processing agreements. We may also disclose data when required by law.
privacy.cookies.title: 5. Cookies
privacy.cookies.body: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
privacy.rights.title: 6. Your rights
privacy.rights.body: Under GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data. You may also object to processing or request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
privacy.retention.title: 7. Data retention
privacy.retention.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 24 months unless a business relationship is established.
privacy.changes.title: 8. Changes to this policy
privacy.changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.contact.title: 9. Contact
privacy.contact.body: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your data rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
